projectDescription: A web-based personal medication inventory management system built with ASP.NET Core Blazor and PostgreSQL that tracks drug stock, expiration dates, and a centralized medicine catalog.
keyFeatures: Secure cookie-based authentication with BCrypt password hashing
Personal medication inventory with full CRUD (add, edit, delete stock)
Centralized medicine catalog with pharmaceutical form and dosage tracking
Real-time inventory search using LINQ client-side filtering
Analytics dashboard with ApexCharts showing total, good, expiring soon, and expired stock
Expiration date alerting with 30-day warning threshold
Clean Architecture / N-Tier layered design (Core, Data, Web)
Raw ADO.NET with custom NpgsqlExtensions for high-performance queries
Nginx reverse proxy configuration with WebSocket (SignalR) support
Global exception handling middleware with UUID incident tracking and error logging
publicApiSurface: ErrorExceptionResponse(string errorCode, HttpStatusCode statusCode, ExceptionLogDto details)
